mapper.sql: id, user_id, issuer, subject, email, email_verified, status, bound_at, last_synchronized_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_external_identity ( id, user_id, issuer, subject, email, email_verified, status, bound_at, last_synchronized_at, revision ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{issuer}, #{subject}, #{email}, #{emailVerified}, #{status}, #{boundAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{lastSynchronizedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_external_identity SET user_id = #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, email = #{email}, email_verified = #{emailVerified}, status = #{status}, last_synchronized_at = #{lastSynchronizedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
